responses: Hello! Welcome to our college chatbot.
Hi there! How can I help you today?
Greetings! What information are you looking for?

patterns: How can I get admission here?
Do you have a deadline for applications?
responses: Applications open Jan 15! Need: Transcripts, LOR, SOP.
You can apply online through our university portal. Applications usually open in January.
The admission process requires submitting an online application, previous transcripts, and a statement of purpose.

patterns: Tell me about the engineering programs
What degrees can I get here?
responses: We offer a variety of courses including Computer Science, Mechanical Engineering, Business Administration, and more.
You can check our full list of majors on the academics page of the university website.
Our most popular programs are CS, Data Science, and Artificial Intelligence.

patterns: Tell me about the tuition fees
Is it expensive to study here?
responses: The tuition fee varies by program. Generally, it is around $15,000 per semester. Scholarships are available.
For detailed fee structures, please visit the Financial Aid office or our website.
The estimated cost of attendance including tuition and hostel is $20,000 per semester.
Goodbye! Have a great day ahead.
You're welcome! Feel free to ask if you have more questions later.
See you! Best of luck with your college journey.
